spec.description:
running commands were for 3 days :

for i in {1..4}; do
  nohup ./armageddon receive \
    --config=arma-config/config/party${i}/user_config.yaml \
    --pullFromPartyId=${i} \
    --expectedTxs=259200000 \
    --output="/tmp${i}" \
    >> receiver${i}.log 2>&1 &
done
nohup ./armageddon load --config=arma-config/config/party1/user_config.yaml --transactions=259200000 --rate=1000 --txSize=300 >> loader.log 2>&1 &

spec.title: Assembler - Attestation to Batch Collation Latency

spec.expr:
sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_mempool_next_requests_latency_seconds_sum
)
/
sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_mempool_next_requests_latency_seconds_count
)

sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_verify_latency_seconds_sum
)
/
sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_verify_latency_seconds_count
)

sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_ledger_append_latency_seconds_sum
)
/
sum by (party_id, shard_id) (
  batcher_batch_ledger_append_latency_seconds_count
)

spec.title: Fabric-X Orderer Dashboard
